headline: Sherwin-Williams Declares Dividend of $0.80 per Common Share
summary: The Board of Directors of The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) today announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.80 per common share, payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 22, 2026.
